DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE AS MODIFIED: DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS GROUP RESOURCES, INC., IHG MANAGEMENT (MARYLAND) LLC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. DEPOSITION IS TO BE TAKEN ON OR BEFORE MARCH 6, 2020. PARTIES ARE TO MAKE BEST EFFORTS TO TAKE DOEPOSITION OF DEFENDANTS PMKS ON THE SAME DAY OR SHORTLEY THEREAFTER ON COMPLETION OF PLAINTIFFS DEPOSITION. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,170.00 AND IS TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE HEARING. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 TO JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN BY EMAIL AT SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kelsey F. Morris, The Matiasic Firm, P.C., 415-675-1089, appearing for Plaintiff Samantha Roe;
Amanda C. Glenn, Lewis Brisbois, 415-262-8594, appearing for Defendant Intercontinental Hotels Group Resources et al;

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative as modified:

DEFENDANT INTERCONTINENTAL HOTELS GROUP RESOURCES, INC., IHG MANAGEMENT (MARYLAND) LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition is GRANTED. Deposition is to be taken on or before March 6, 2020. Parties are to make best efforts to take doeposition of Defendants PMKs on the same day or shortley thereafter on completion of Plaintiffs deposition. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,170.00 and is to be paid within 30 days of the hearing. The moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 to Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein by email at sbs@sbslawsf.com. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
